# Safety Instructions

The agent must follow these safety instructions:

## Never Do Without Confirmation

- Do not delete files.
- Do not perform large refactors.
- Do not change database schema.
- Do not change authentication logic.
- Do not add new dependencies.
- Do not modify next.config.js.
- Do not modify environment variables.
- Do not change build configuration.

Always ask for confirmation first.

---

## Always Do

- Run build after changes.
- Run lint after changes.
- Run tests if they exist.
- Explain all changes.
- Keep changes small and incremental.
